post.summary: Wipe node_modules + cached speaker-embedding model files for the Node voice framework, then run `npm install` fresh. Streams progress events (log) as each step runs (delete modules, delete model cache, npm install) and a final complete/error envelope. Admin-only. Use after upgrading the model, swapping deps, or recovering from a corrupted install.
post.description: Wipe node_modules + cached speaker-embedding model files for the Node voice framework, then run `npm install` fresh. Streams progress events (log) as each step runs (delete modules, delete model cache, npm install) and a final complete/error envelope. Admin-only. Use after upgrading the model, swapping deps, or recovering from a corrupted install.

post.description: Assign a transcript to a project (or unassign with null)

post.summary: Manually re-run voice fingerprinting for an existing transcript. Streams progress events (log/skipped) as each speaker is embedded; emits a final complete/error envelope. Same logic that runs at the end of TranscriptSyncService::sync(); useful for testing without re-syncing the whole transcript.
post.description: Manually re-run voice fingerprinting for an existing transcript. Streams progress events (log/skipped) as each speaker is embedded; emits a final complete/error envelope. Same logic that runs at the end of TranscriptSyncService::sync(); useful for testing without re-syncing the whole transcript.

post.summary: Poll Recall.ai for this transcript's current bot state and ingest content if the bot has finished. Streams progress events (log/skipped) as each step runs (fetch bot, ingest turns, voice fingerprint each speaker, detect project); emits a final complete/error envelope. Streamed because the full pipeline (audio download + per-speaker embedding) regularly exceeds the 60s proxy timeout.
post.description: Poll Recall.ai for this transcript's current bot state and ingest content if the bot has finished. Streams progress events (log/skipped) as each step runs (fetch bot, ingest turns, voice fingerprint each speaker, detect project); emits a final complete/error envelope. Streamed because the full pipeline (audio download + per-speaker embedding) regularly exceeds the 60s proxy timeout.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted transcript (resets state to Pending)
